prompt: A highly realistic scene inside a dimly lit tailoring workshop. A tailor is obsessively stitching an extremely detailed suit onto a rigid mannequin with unnatural proportions. The suit fits the mannequin perfectly, with excessive seams, patches, and adjustments visible everywhere. Around the workshop, normal human silhouettes are visible but none of the suits fit them. The mannequin stands unnaturally still while the tailor focuses only on it, ignoring everything else. The atmosphere is slightly tense and obsessive. No text, no diagrams, no symbols. Photorealistic, cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, high detail, natural textures, believable real-world scene
metaphor: A tailor perfectly fitting a suit to a mannequin with unnatural proportions, making it unusable for real people, mirroring overfitting to training data
